name: Before a large inn
description:
As you walk further you come to the end of the road.  Before you is a large
inn.  Laughter and song flows from the flet and the sweet smell of cooked meat
caresses your nose.  It is on a large tree, whose branches start to leave the
central trunk at about twenty-five feet.  This tree is very crowded, and the
branches almost seem to strain under the sprawling flet perched atop them.
